sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The game is over. The batch was cut off after 9 actions. The game says "game over" but the level isn't complete. It seems like the game is over because I clicked too many green blocks at once. Let me try a different approach - maybe I need to click the purple blocks. Let me check the purple blocks.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'p':
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(n['id'], n['color'], cr, cc, n['pixels'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
